args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', ''))
JOIN Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id, '#', ''))
WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(o.AccountId, '#', '')) = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'

val_args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', ''))
JOIN Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id, '#', ''))
WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(o.AccountId, '#', '')) = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'
